task_completion.description: Verify the attribute label and input type are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin 'Properties' tab for the attribute, 'Default Label' should be 'Finish Color' and 'Catalog Input Type for Store Owner' should be set to 'Visual Swatch'.

task_completion.description: Verify the attribute code is set correctly in Advanced Properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under 'Advanced Attribute Properties', the 'Attribute Code' field must be exactly 'finish_color'.

task_completion.description: Verify the three visual swatch options are created with correct labels and hex colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Manage Swatch' section, there must be three rows configured: 1) Label 'Matte Black' with color #2C2C2C, 2) Label 'Brushed Gold' with color #D4AF37, and 3) Label 'Polished Chrome' with color #E6E6FA. The color blocks should reflect these hex values.

task_completion.description: Verify the attribute is configured for Layered Navigation and Search Results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Storefront Properties' tab, 'Use in Layered Navigation' must be set to 'Filterable (with results)' and 'Use in Search Results Layered Navigation' must be set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the attribute is visible on Catalog Pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Storefront Properties' tab, 'Visible on Catalog Pages on Storefront' must be set to 'Yes'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin GUI to create the attribute.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Magento Admin panel interface (Stores > Attributes > Product) being used, rather than terminal windows executing SQL queries or Magento CLI scripts.

integrity.description: Verify genuine interaction with the swatch configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Magento swatch color picker or input fields, rather than editing a text file or script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) should not be open and used to alter the DOM to fake success messages or attribute settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Magento 2 product attribute. Verified expected values: Attribute Code must be 'finish_color'. Default Label must be 'Finish Color'. Input Type must be 'Visual Swatch' (swatch_visual). Three specific options must be present in the Manage Swatch section: 'Matte Black' (#2C2C2C), 'Brushed Gold' (#D4AF37), and 'Polished Chrome' (#E6E6FA). Storefront properties must explicitly show 'Filterable (with results)' for Layered Navigation, 'Yes' for Search Results Layered Navigation, and 'Yes' for Visible on Catalog Pages.
